1.name: Heightened Senses
1.description: Raise your five senses to superhuman levels (you may choose to enhance only one).
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 134

1.name: Ancestors' Vigilance
1.description: Raise one of your five senses and perceive ghosts.
references: Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 99

2.name: An Ear for Lies
2.description: Know when someone lies to you.

2.name: Aura Perception
2.description: Learn various qualities of a person from their aura.
references: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 135

2.name: Sense Vibrations
2.description: Learn the most intense emotion of a person.
references: Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 100

3.name: Artist's Intent
3.description: Learn details of an artist's state of mind in relation to a piece of art.

3.name: The Spirit's Touch
3.description: Learn something of an object and its previous owner from its resonance.

3.name: Spirit Ties
3.description: Learn something about a target from residues of its tissue.
references: Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 100

4.name: Telepathy
4.description: Briefly probe someone's mind or project a telepathic message to them.

4.name: Ancestors' Insight
4.description: Briefly probe someone's mind, project a telepathic message, or plant a foreign thought in the mind of the target.
references: Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 101

5.name: Psychic Projection
5.description: Free your mind to travel the world in astral form.

5.name: Spirit Travel
5.description: Project your mind into one of the spiritual realms.
references: Kindred of the Ebony Kingdom Pg. 101

6.name: Babble
6.description: Create a multi-participant telepathic link vulnerable to sensory interference.

6.name: Celestial Harmony
6.description: Open your mind to the thoughts and emotions of a crowd.

6.name: Clairvoyance
6.description: See what is happening in a distant location.

6.name: Telepathic Communication
6.description: Mentally speak with someone even at great distance.

6.name: Prediction
6.description: Socially outwit someone by anticipating their words.

7.name: Anima Gathering
7.description: Take others with you during astral travel.

7.name: Karmic Sight
7.description: View someone's aura, morality, and karmic traits.

7.name: Mirror Reflex
7.description: React in combat by reading an opponent's thoughts.

8.name: Omniscience
8.description: Learn the personalities and identities of all creatures around you.

8.name: Psychic Assault
8.description: Launch a powerful mental attack against a target.

8.name: The Oracle's Sight
8.description: Hear and see the thoughts of everyone around you.

9.name: Precognition
9.description: Gain insight into what may happen at a particular time and place.

10.name: Pulse of the Canaille
10.description: Sense the attitudes and trends of mortal populations and those influencing them.
